title: OLDER ADULTS AND ADULTS WITH DISABILITIES SERVICES - 211info
text: CENTRAL POINT ROGUE VALLEY COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS OLDER ADULTS AND ADULTS WITH DISABILITIES SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a range of services to older adults and adults with disabilities, including assessment, case management, administration of SNAP (food stamps), Oregon Supplemental Income Program (OSIP) and other Medicaid programs, Medicare Savings Programs, and information and referral to coordinated programs and services. Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 664-6674 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 664-6674 TTY/TTD (833) 685-0841 ODHS Language Access and Accommodations INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Some programs require an in-person or phone interview appointment. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Case/Care Management * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Case/Care Management * Older Adults Food Stamps/SNAP * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Food Stamps/SNAP * Older Adults Medicaid * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Medicaid * Older Adults Medicare Information/Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
